name: Dimensiongate Orb
description: Notes Quite the flexible orb as it offers useful stats with the +40 HP boosting the Mystic’s survivability and +5 DEX increasing her damage output, the second longest stasis duration at 6.5 seconds and even the longest curse duration of 8.5 seconds at 80 WIS.
effects: On enemies: Stasis and Curse Stasis Radius: 3 tiles Stasis Duration: 6.5 seconds Curse Radius: 5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Curse Duration: 5.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds
